content.problemStatement:
Print each word of the below-given sentence on a new line.

`I love CodeChef
`
content.outputFormat: Print the three words of the sentence "I love CodeChef" each on a separate line, in the given order.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints each word of the fixed sentence on its own line.

solution.approach: The task does not require any computation. The program simply prints the three fixed words "I", "love" and "CodeChef" each on its own line. To satisfy the platform's requirement of handling test cases, we iterate over a dummy test‑case count T = 1 and output the three lines inside the loop.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) – only a constant number of print operations are performed.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few constant‑size variables are used.
